LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Set For Trial On Feb-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: crosby connolly, esq., 619.233.7770, for defendant maria litinetsky; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The demurrer to the Answer serves no useful purpose. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, because the Court did not receive Discover Bank's courtesy copies of the moving papers in a timely fashion to review the demurrer. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To May-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to May 21, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
